subject: feat(pwa): add 180px Apple touch icon for iOS home screen
body:
Add apple-touch-icon.png (180x180) to the icon generation pipeline and
link it in index.html so iOS devices display the correct branded icon
when users add the dashboard to their home screen.

Tags: pwa, icons, ios, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor
